{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/nautilus/composite-skills-agents/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "composite-skills-agents"
tags:
  * nautilus
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. composite-skills-agents

_Файлов:_ 13

h2. Содержание

* [[01-why-binary-incomplete|01-why-binary-incomplete.md]] — 
* [[02-twenty-one-teachers-pattern|02-twenty-one-teachers-pattern.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[03-what-makes-csa|03-what-makes-csa.md]] — 
* [[04-sub-agent-registry|04-sub-agent-registry.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[05-configuration-ensembles|05-configuration-ensembles.md]] — 
* [[06-coordination-disagreement|06-coordination-disagreement.md]] — 
* [[07-economics-combinatorial|07-economics-combinatorial.md]] — 
* [[08-seven-domains|08-seven-domains.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[09-okwf-integration|09-okwf-integration.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[10-risks|10-risks.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[11-open-questions|11-open-questions.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[12-call-for-collaboration|12-call-for-collaboration.md]] — 
* [[13-closing|13-closing.md]] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[253-table-of-contents]] (сходство 0.41)

* [[README]] (сходство 0.30)
